name: Candy Licorice Bullets 150g
description:
Candy Licorice Bullets 150g

Product Description:

If you love a mix of chewy and sweet, you’ll enjoy our Candy Licorice Bullets! These bite-sized treats are made with soft, rich licorice centres coated in a smooth candy shell. They’re colourful, fun to eat, and packed with flavour in every bite.

The Candy Licorice Bullet is perfect for sharing, snacking, or adding to lolly jars and party bags. Whether you’re a long-time licorice lover or just looking for something new to try, these tasty bullets are a delicious twist on a classic favourite.

Great for movie nights, road trips, or a little afternoon pick-me-up, the Candy Licorice Bullets are loved by both kids and adults. The balance of the chewy inside and crunchy outside makes them a satisfying treat any time of day.
